creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
With upgrade to nextcloud 14.0.0 the pkg-plist definition is wrong.
```
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: @dir %%DATADIR%%
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/www/nextcloud
```

Please see here for details:
https://pkg.fechner.net/data/111amd64-default/2018-09-16_22h39m49s/logs/errors/nextcloud-php71-14.0.0.log
